title: Sanctions and Tariffs Test Russia's Crude Trade
section_path: Sanctions and Tariffs Test Russia's Crude Trade
section_path_text: Sanctions and Tariffs Test Russia's Crude Trade
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2025-09-07_sanctions-and-tariffs-test-russias-crude-trade_img_singapore-anchorage_738512a8ef27.jpg
Western economies are turning up the heat on Russia, tightening sanctions and raising tariffs in an effort to squeeze its energy revenues. Yet despite mounting pressure, Russian crude exports have so far shown remarkable resilience. The EU's lower crude price cap came into effect this week, and Washington has doubled tariffs on Indian goods to 50% as part of the efforts to pressure New Delhi over its continued imports of Russian crude.
